comments.text: This is painfully accurate 😭
Happened to me literally yesterday!
I was the one person 💀
Week 3 me waking up at 6am for 8am class 😂
Name and shame. I'll wait. (edit: ok it was me too, briefly)
500 applications is not an exaggeration (edit: it's 600 now)
The Bloomberg Terminal jumpscare every morning
update: the topic WAS on the exam. prof lied to our faces
The audacity of my Week 1 self
The prof said it with such confidence too (edited: apparently he forgot he put it in section B)
Fellow finance major here. Felt this in my soul.
We do not talk about IS101 group project
Let's not talk about rejection rates during a recession
Bro I have the notes if you need them lolzz
I defended this meme in front of my econ prof. He gave partial credit.
I peaked at orientation and I will not be taking questions
Rectangle 47 is my nemesis
Voice crack during the Q&A is a rite of passage
The slides WERE beautiful though, we love Sophie
Update: got a 3rd callback. We are so back.
I want this post deleted but I physically cannot
A SEMICOLON. I LOST 4 HOURS.
It was also the wrong semicolon. There were two.
It was a comma for me. Different vibe, same pain.
This is why I switched to design 💀 (edited: and I still debug CSS)
Finding this at 3am mid-debug. The timing is poetic.
